name: Souffleed Saltines
recipeIngredient: Poppy seeds, sesame seeds, or coarse (kosher) salt for topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In one or more shallow pans of ice water, float a single layer of saltines until softened but not disintegrated, about 20 minutes.
3. Remove with a slotted spatula, letting excess water drain off, and arrange in a single layer about 1-1/2 inches apart on greased baking sheets.
4. Generously brush tops of crackers with melted butter, taking care not to press down.
5. Top with a sprinkling of seeds or salt.
6. Bake until crackers are puffed and golden, 20 to 25 minutes.
7. Serve warm, or let cool on a wire rack and store airtight. If made in advance, reheat 3 minutes in a 400 degree oven until crisp.
